overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking across a futuristic suspension bridge at dusk. The scene features towering neon-lit megabuildings, passing vehicles, and a cyberpunk cityscape with mixed natural and artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic suspension bridge walkway approaching city center

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the bridge walkway toward the illuminated megabuildings

entered.detail: towering futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows and neon accents
massive cable-stayed bridge support tower with suspension cables
colorful illuminated advertisements on building facades
concrete pedestrian walkway with metal railings

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view walking along a futuristic bridge toward a cluster of illuminated megabuildings. The walkway is empty, with sparse traffic passing on the adjacent road. The cyberpunk cityscape features towering structures with neon signage against a dusky sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: bridge walkway with open sky view

events.description: camera turns right to look at the moon and observe passing traffic

agents.ego_description: pausing to look right at the moon and watch futuristic vehicles pass on the bridge road

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving past with headlights on

entered.detail: full moon visible in the dusky sky
futuristic cars driving on the bridge roadway
metal safety railing along the walkway edge

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right to reveal the moon in the dusky sky and passing traffic on the bridge. The megabuildings shift to the left side of the frame as the character observes the vehicles driving past. The scene emphasizes the scale of the bridge and the open sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered bridge section with large advertising billboards

events.description: camera turns back left to face the city direction
passing under the large overhead billboard structure

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward while passing under the billboard structure and observing the architecture

entered.detail: large overhead advertisement displaying 'IT'S BIG' with product image
multi-level highway interchange with glowing signage
massive concrete pillar supporting the bridge structure

segments.scene_description: The camera turns back left and passes under a massive billboard structure displaying advertisements. The lighting becomes more artificial and sheltered under the overpass. The megabuildings return to the center of the view while an elevated highway complex becomes visible on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: open bridge with panoramic city views

events.description: camera pans left to show the elevated highway interchange

agents.ego_description: walking while panning camera to admire the surrounding megabuildings and infrastructure

entered.detail: intricate network of elevated roadways and transit bridges
dense collection of illuminated signs and holographic advertisements

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character continuing along the bridge with panoramic views of the cyberpunk cityscape. The camera pans to reveal an elaborate elevated highway system and dense clusters of neon signage. The megabuildings tower ahead as the walk continues toward the city center.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey across a futuristic suspension bridge that transitions from an open, dusky vista into a dense, neon-lit urban canyon. It begins with a steady walk toward a cluster of illuminated megabuildings under a darkening sky, with sparse traffic flowing along the adjacent road. As the camera turns right, the view opens to reveal the moon hanging above the horizon and the scale of the bridge's traffic before shifting back toward the city. The scene then moves under a massive billboard structure, where the natural light fades into sheltered, artificial glows and an elevated highway complex emerges on the left. Finally, the camera pans across a panoramic expanse of the cyberpunk cityscape, revealing an elaborate network of highways and dense neon signage as the path leads deeper toward the towering city center.
